tasks.label: pilot-batch-01-scope5
tasks.command: .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m scrapy crawl fis_pilot -a seed_file=input/urls_master.txt -a scope_limit=5 -a review_from=0 -a max_interactions=5

tasks.label: pilot-quick-ayuda
args: cd fis_scraper && ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m scrapy crawl fis_pilot -a seed_file=input/urls_test_ayuda.txt -a scope_limit=1 -a review_from=0 -a max_interactions=1
